attributes.action: Oppose governments plan to offer failed asylum seekers 40k each to leave the UK.
attributes.additional_details: Tax payers should not be paying to reward people who come into this country illegally, they should simply be detained and deported.
attributes.background: Oppose or scrap the plan to offer failed asylum seekers 40k each of tax payers money to voluntarily leave the country.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for the same action: "Stop pilot scheme giving up to £40,000 to failed asylum seeker families" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763401
